Group A Strep 
Clinical Guidance for Acute Rheumatic Fever 
Aug. 5, 2025 
Key points 
Acute rheumatic fever is a delayed sequela of some group A streptococcal infections. 
It affects many organ systems and has a varied clinical presentation. One manifestation, carditis, may result in long-term disability or death. 
Treatment involves antibiotics, which help preve
